android.title: Tricky Story 2: Brain Twist
android.summary: Solve mind logic riddles and puzzle games! Challenge your IQ in this smart quest
android.description:
Welcome to Tricky Story 2: Brain Twist – the ultimate destination for fans of mind logic riddle puzzle games. Are you ready to test your IQ and outsmart every challenge?
In this sequel, we bring you a collection of smart and unexpected logic puzzles that require you to think outside the box. This isn't just an ordinary IQ test; it’s a mystery where every choice matters. Can you solve the most complex riddle levels?
Why you should play Tricky Story 2:
Logic Riddles: Hundreds of levels designed to challenge your mind and improve your skill.
Smart Choices: Make the right decision to find the hidden truth behind every story.
Mind-Bending Puzzles: A perfect mix of find, draw, and erase mechanics similar to your favorite braindom and dop challenges.
Brain Twist Levels: Each stage is a new test for your genius.
Mystery & Discovery: Uncover secrets in a world where nothing is as it seems.
Whether you are a master of easy games or looking for a tough brain test, our riddle puzzle game will keep you engaged for hours. Use your logic to find the solution, draw the missing part, or erase the obstacles to win.
Do you have the genius to finish all levels? Enjoy Tricky Story 2: Brain Twist now and join the community of riddle solvers today!
android.recentChanges: We have updated new levels and fixed performance-related issues

ios.title: Tricky Story 2: Brain Twist
ios.description:
Welcome back to Tricky Story 2 – the sequel where the puzzles are trickier and the stories are even crazier!

Everything you loved about the first game is back, but with a whole new level of "Wait, what?!" moments. Challenge your logic, sharpen your wit, and get ready for the ultimate brain workout that doesn't take itself too seriously.

What’s New in Part 2:

Brand-New Levels: Fresh brain-teasers that will keep you guessing.
Epic Plot Twists: Each level tells a hilarious story where nothing is as it seems.
Smarter Logic Puzzles: Think even further outside the box to outsmart our tricky scenarios.
Vibrant Visuals: Improved graphics and charming animations for a better experience.
Easy to Play, Hard to Solve: Simple tap-and-swipe controls, but the logic will melt your brain!

Do you have a high IQ? Don't be fooled by the obvious! Enjoy Tricky Story 2 now, solve the mysteries, and see if you can handle the funny truth behind every level!

There were just a few parts where it was really hard to find the right answer, but I really liked it a lot. It's really fun to play. I hope Story 3 gets updated soon. I recommend this to my friends. Overall it's great except for the fact that level 54 glitches, when I try to give claire the stack of money, nothing happens, but then I try it on riley, her appearance changes.

could be fun, but some of the levels are so unfair. you literally only get 5 hearts and some of the levels have stuff that’s like genuinely how were you even supposed to figure that out unless you looked it up or just wasted a bunch of hearts trying. Some levels have things where if you do the wrong thing(with literally no clue, knowledge, or any sorta help) you just lose a heart. not to mention it’s 600 coins to keep going if you don’t wanna watch an ad and you only get 40 per round.. you do the math. there also some dumb glitch that keeps saying download failed whenever it feels like it and just crashes you out the game and makes you restart the whole thing. Maddie is literally so annoying and I was gonna hate the game a little less when I saw we weren’t gonna forgive her, but then all she did was insert herself and now we’re best friends again after all the stuff she did to us, right… apparently kids games only emphasize forgiveness over knowing when to remove yourself from a toxic friendship because Maddie didn’t deserve Riley at all. then Riley itself is just dumb. literally everything could’ve been avoided but I just think she likes drama. I like her enough to overlook it tho. then when you think the game couldn’t get any worse, there’s a whole section dedicated to maddie and helping her figure out her love life… yea, next. deleted.

This game is honestly quite frustrating. The time limit is too strict, and having only five lives makes it even worse. In the middle of gameplay, a “take a moment to rest” pop-up appears, which just wastes time and breaks the flow—really annoying. Playing offline solves this issue but not the above two limitations- they are extremely annoying. The storyline does seem interesting, but these limitations completely ruin the experience.
